full_text:
Song Xian 宋憲
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Song Xian (宋憲). Served Lü Bu, but joined Cao Cao after Hou Cheng was punished. Killed by Yan Liang. Song Xian was affiliated with Lu Bu and the Wei Kingdom.
